macro_summary: Thin company-specific flow today; KSE-100 closed a bullish week on peace/budget optimism (Dawn). Bigger macro swing factor: top-level US-Iran peace talks opened at a Swiss resort with the Strait of Hormuz explicitly 'in the spotlight', but Trump simultaneously threatened to strike Iran over Hezbollah support and Iran warned the US to 'be careful' (Business Recorder) -- reintroducing the Hormuz/oil-supply risk that had been fading after last week's de-escalation. Talks are live, not concluded, so this is a watch item rather than a confirmed price mover yet.

OGDC.summary: Renewed US-Iran friction (Trump strike threat, Iran's warning) right as Hormuz-focused talks start reopens upside risk to oil prices, which would help E&P realised prices -- but talks are ongoing and outcome unconfirmed, so this is a mild, low-confidence positive tilt rather than a confirmed catalyst.
headlines: Top-level US-Iran peace talks to begin at Swiss resort with Hormuz in spotlight
Trump threatens to strike Iran over support for Hezbollah
Iran warns US to 'be careful' after Trump threat

PPL.summary: Same renewed Hormuz/US-Iran tension applies to PPL's gas/oil realisations -- mild, low-confidence positive tilt while talks remain unresolved.
headlines: Top-level US-Iran peace talks to begin at Swiss resort with Hormuz in spotlight
Trump threatens to strike Iran over support for Hezbollah
Iran warns US to 'be careful' after Trump threat

PSO.summary: Renewed Hormuz/US-Iran tension cuts the other way for an OMC -- any firming in oil prices would pressure cost/margin, though nothing is confirmed while talks are still in progress, so this stays a mild, low-confidence negative tilt.
headlines: Top-level US-Iran peace talks to begin at Swiss resort with Hormuz in spotlight
Trump threatens to strike Iran over support for Hezbollah

PRL.summary: Same logic as PSO -- a refiner's feedstock cost outlook turns mildly less favourable if Hormuz tension pushes oil prices back up, but it's a live, unresolved situation.
headlines: Top-level US-Iran peace talks to begin at Swiss resort with Hormuz in spotlight
Trump threatens to strike Iran over support for Hezbollah

ENGROH.summary: No company-specific item; the only allowlisted headline naming the broader equity market notes KSE-100 closed a bullish week on peace/budget optimism -- a market-wide tailwind, not a company catalyst, so scored as a mild, low-confidence positive only.
headlines: Equities turn in bullish week on peace, budget optimism
